signin.brand_desc: Join thousands of students and researchers using AI-powered mind mapping to organize knowledge and learn faster.
signin.testimonial_quote: NeuroCanvas changed how I study. The AI suggestions helped me connect concepts I never would have linked on my own.
signin.form_subtitle: Sign in to continue to your maps

validation.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.2fa_required: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app

error.account_not_linked: This email is already registered with a different sign-in method.
error.oauth: There was a problem signing in. Please try again.
error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
error.failed: Sign in failed. Please try again.

signup.brand_desc: Free, open-source, and built for students. Create your first mind map in seconds with AI-powered suggestions.
signup.form_subtitle: Start mapping your ideas for free
signup.success: Account created successfully! Redirecting to sign in...
signup.terms: By creating an account, you agree to our

validation.empty: Please fill in all required fields
validation.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address

verify.title: Check your email
verify.message_with_email: We sent a sign-in link to
verify.message_without_email: We sent you a sign-in link.
verify.hint: Click the link in the email to sign in to your account. The link will expire in 24 hours.
verify.tip_spam: Check your spam or junk folder
verify.tip_email: Make sure you entered the correct email
verify.tip_wait: Wait a few minutes and try again

error.page_desc: The authentication link expired, broke, or was used by a different brain. These things happen — even to the best neural networks.

configuration.title: Server Error
configuration.message: There is a problem with the server configuration. Please try again later.

access_denied.title: Access Denied
access_denied.message: You do not have permission to sign in. This might be because your email is not allowed.

verification.title: Verification Failed
verification.message: The sign in link has expired or has already been used. Please request a new one.

oauth_signin.title: Sign In Error
oauth_signin.message: An error occurred while trying to sign in with that provider. Please try again.

oauth_callback.title: Callback Error
oauth_callback.message: An error occurred during the sign in callback. Please try again.

oauth_create_account.title: Account Creation Failed
oauth_create_account.message: Could not create an account with that provider. The email might already be in use.

oauth_account_not_linked.title: Account Not Linked
oauth_account_not_linked.message: This email is already associated with a different sign-in method. Please use your original sign-in method.

credentials_signin.title: Sign In Failed
credentials_signin.message: The email or password you entered is incorrect. Please try again.

session_required.title: Session Required
session_required.message: You need to be signed in to access this page.

default.title: Authentication Error
default.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

magic_link.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a sign-in link. No password required.
magic_link.success_message: We sent a sign-in link to
magic_link.success_hint: Click the link in the email to sign in. The link will expire in 24 hours.

desktop_auth.title: Sign in to NeuroCanvas
desktop_auth.desc: Sign in to sync your maps across devices and access community templates.
desktop_auth.browser_signin: Sign in with Google or GitHub in browser
